tree.setup: You're reading a Chinese menu at a restaurant and encounter a word you don't know. The waiter notices your confusion and kindly helps.
tree.setup_zh: 你在饭馆看中文菜单，遇到一个不认识的词。服务员注意到你的困惑，友好地帮忙。

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Ask the waiter about the word.

options.text_zh: 不好意思，请问这个菜是什么？「干锅」是什么意思？
options.text_pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn zhège cài shì shénme? 'Gānguō' shì shénme yìsi?
options.text_en: Excuse me, what is this dish? What does 'dry pot' mean?
options.feedback: Polite and direct — the best way to learn.
Asks price without understanding the dish.

options.text_pinyin: Suàn le, wǒ diǎn bié de.
options.text_en: Never mind, I'll order something else.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 干锅就是没有汤的炒菜，用高温炒出来的。我们的干锅土豆片特别受欢迎，又香又脆。你要不要试试？
turns.text_pinyin: Gānguō jiù shì méiyǒu tāng de chǎocài, yòng gāowēn chǎo chūlái de. Wǒmen de gānguō tǔdòu piàn tèbié shòu huānyíng, yòu xiāng yòu cuì. Nǐ yào bú yào shìshi?
turns.text_en: Dry pot is a stir-fry without broth — cooked at high heat. Our dry pot potato slices are very popular — fragrant and crispy. Want to try?

options.text_zh: 原来是这样！来一份干锅土豆片吧。谢谢你，我又学了一个新词。
options.text_pinyin: Yuánlái shì zhèyàng! Lái yī fèn gānguō tǔdòu piàn ba. Xièxie nǐ, wǒ yòu xué le yī ge xīn cí.
options.text_en: Oh I see! I'll have the dry pot potato slices. Thanks — learned a new word.
options.feedback: Appreciative and celebrates learning in daily life.
Orders but doesn't acknowledge the learning.

options.text_pinyin: Bú là ba? Wǒ bù chī là.
options.text_en: It's not spicy, right? I don't eat spicy food.
options.feedback: Practical but ignores the vocabulary moment.

tree.cultural_note: Learning Chinese vocabulary through real-life situations — like reading menus — is one of the most natural and effective methods. Restaurant staff in China are usually patient and happy to explain dishes. 干锅 (dry pot) is a popular Hunan-Sichuan cooking style.
